found_stable.quote: 18 months of Executive's then-current base salary
Executive will receive an annual bonus equal to 60% of base salary for each calendar year in which Executive remains employed for at least one day.
During employment and for 36 months after separation, Executive will not provide services to any business that competes with Company anywhere in North America.
Incentive compensation and equity paid or granted under this Agreement will not be reduced, recovered, or forfeited after payment or vesting except by Executive's written consent.
